title: Frost Default  by TMT
description: Frost Default is a blue-themed texture pack by TUN MIN THANT, adding a cool, frosty twist to Minecraft's default look—simple, clean, and refreshing.
body:
## # ✨ Frost Default by TUN MIN THANT
A chill twist on the classic Minecraft look! This blue-themed pack keeps the default style but adds a frosty vibe for a clean, cool, and refreshing experience. Perfect for players who love the vanilla feel—with a frosty edge ❄️

1.
❄️ Frost Default gives Minecraft a sleek, blue makeover while staying true to its original feel. It’s vanilla—but cooler. Literally.

2.
A crisp, clean, and icy take on Minecraft’s default textures. Frost Default keeps it familiar, with a frosty blue style that’s easy on the eyes.

3.
Love the default Minecraft look but want something fresh? Frost Default adds a subtle blue vibe for a smooth, refreshing experience.

4.
Not icy, just chill. Frost Default brings a calm, frosty palette to the vanilla textures—perfect for cool builders and cozy adventurers alike.

5.
A default-style texture pack with a frosty blue twist. Simple, smooth, and satisfying—Frost Default cools things down just right.

### [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@tmtcrafter)
